# Africanmoose 

## Pic of the week
![05.04 - Publish digital garden resource folder/_DSC1242-sunrise.jpg](data:image/png;base64,)
Sunrise in Amboseli, Kenya. It has been exceedingly dry and this vast place looked just like a desert, but the sunrise was stunning.
